pr.title: Restructure camera capture viewfinder and HUD layer stack
pr.body: ## Summary ### Camera layer stack - Two-block `CameraCaptureScreen` layout with tap-to-focus reticle ### Shimmer modifier - `Modifier.shimmerEffect()` — diagonal metallic sweep gradient ### Loading invoice skeleton (new) - **`LoadingInvoiceScreen`** — provider header, CPT row placeholders, balance summary card; all use `.shimmerEffect()` with rounded clips - **`HistoryRoute`** shows skeleton while `uiState.isLoadingInvoice` (OCR/upload in progress) - Loading clears when Firestore history updates or on OCR/upload error ## Test plan - [ ] Upload library image or camera scan → History shows shimmer skeleton until records refresh - [ ] OCR failure dismisses skeleton and shows toast - [ ] Normal history browse shows `AnalysisScreen` when not loading
pr.author: ljduhart
